construct_verdict_reason: Items p4 and p7 align well with the construct, but p6 measures problem prioritization rather than perceived severity or personal relevance.

items.reason: Directly measures perceived severity of environmental conditions at the macro (national) level, core to environmental problem salience.

Measures which environmental problem respondents rank as most important nationally, which is a prioritization judgment distinct from perceived severity or personal relevance of environmental problems.
Directly measures personal relevance by asking which environmental problem most affects the respondent and family at the micro (household) level.
